Case# CWErr.cwSupplicantTimeoutErr

macOS 10.6+

```
case cwSupplicantTimeoutErr
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/corewlan/cwerr/cwsupplicanttimeouterr#Discussion)

WPA/WPA2 handshake timed out.
